title: Premium Letterpress Coffee Roaster Brand Kit | Vintage Cafe Logo Templates & Packaging Design | Editable Illustrator & Canva
description:
Capture the rich, tactile essence of a third-wave coffee roastery. This premium letterpress-inspired brand kit is designed for artisanal coffee makers, boutique cafes, and craft roasters who want a visual identity as robust as their daily roast. Featuring vintage-inspired typography and textured, stamped elements, it instantly elevates your packaging from homemade to high-end.

Skip the expensive agency fees without compromising on craftsmanship. Every element has been meticulously crafted to simulate the authentic bite and ink-bleed of traditional letterpress printing. Fully customizable and incredibly easy to edit, you can launch your specialty coffee brand's new look this weekend.

WHAT IS INCLUDED:
• 4 Primary & Secondary Logo Variations
• 3 Coffee Bag Label Templates (Whole Bean, Espresso, Single Origin)
• Custom Stamp & Submark Designs
• Typography Pairing Guide & Curated Color Palette
• Fully editable files for both Adobe Illustrator (AI/EPS) and Canva.
